common.tagline: Find a verified private tutor in your city

hero.kicker: Live in Gaziantep · Expanding across Türkiye
hero.title: Find your tutor in minutes.
hero.subtitle: In person or online — match with a verified tutor in your district, no app required.

featured.title: Most-booked tutors in Gaziantep
featured.description: Verified identity, fast response, transparent prices.

trust.title: Not the platform you trust your child to — the platform you stay in control of.

verified.title: Verified tutors
verified.description: Every tutor passes identity and diploma checks. You see the badge on their profile.

fast.title: Fast response
fast.description: Offers start landing within an hour of posting your request.

local.title: Your district, your block
local.description: Not just city — pick Şahinbey, Şehitkamil, or online.

one.title: Tell us subject and city
one.description: Post a lesson request in 60 seconds with phone verification.

two.title: Get offers from verified tutors
two.description: Tutors in your city reach out — see their prices and availability.

three.title: Pick one and pay them directly
three.description: We do not mediate. Contact the tutor and arrange the lesson yourself.

lead_cta.title: Tell us the subject. Tutors will reach you.
lead_cta.description: Fill one short form. Tutors in your city write to you. Free, no app needed.

meta.title: Post a free lesson request
meta.description: Tell us the subject and city — verified tutors will reach you. Free, no app required.

lead.title: Tell us what you need. Tutors will reach you.
lead.subtitle: Takes 60 seconds. Verified tutors in your city send offers; you pick the one that fits.
lead.submit_footnote: Free · No app required · Your phone is shared only with matching tutors.
lead.error_generic: Couldn't submit your request. Please try again.

what.title: What do you want to learn?
what.description: Pick a subject and level, set the lesson modality.

where.title: Where?
where.description: For in-person lessons, give your city and district.

details.title: Details (optional)
details.description: Budget, schedule, notes — leave blank if not sure.

contact.title: How can we reach you?
contact.description: Tutors need a phone number to contact you.

notes.label: Notes
notes.placeholder: Student's current level, target exam, specific needs…

kvkk.label: I have read the <privacy>KVKK & Privacy Policy</privacy> and consent to the processing of my personal data.

errors.phone_invalid: Enter a valid TR mobile number (5XX XXX XX XX).
errors.kvkk_required: Tick the KVKK consent to continue.
errors.budget_range_invalid: Max budget cannot be lower than min budget.

aside.title: What happens after you submit?
aside.item_free: The form is free — no payment taken.
aside.item_no_app: No app needed — everything happens on the web.
aside.item_verified: Only verified tutors can see your request.
aside.item_response: First offers usually arrive within an hour.
aside.item_no_payment: You pay the tutor directly — we don't mediate.

success.title: Your request is in.
success.subtitle: Verified tutors in your city are seeing it now. First offers usually land in your SMS within an hour.
success.step1_description: We text you each time a new offer comes in.
success.step2_description: Use the free mobile app to compare offers side-by-side.
success.app_description: Instant notifications, in-app messaging, and side-by-side comparison live in the mobile app.

meta.title: Become a tutor · LessonRadar
meta.description: Free tutor profile for private teachers in Gaziantep and major Turkish cities. Verified identity, transparent pricing, get matched with real lesson requests.

hero.title: Share what you teach. Get matched with real requests.
hero.subtitle: Students post lesson requests in Gaziantep and major cities every day. Build your profile, our team reviews and approves it, and matches start coming through.

no_fee.title: Free profile
no_fee.description: No commission, no subscription. When you agree with a student, you get paid directly.

verified.title: Verified tutor badge
verified.description: Identity- and diploma-verified tutors rank higher in search results.

local_demand.title: District-level demand
local_demand.description: Match by district, not just city. Stay close to home; skip requests from across town.

transparency.title: Transparent pricing
transparency.description: Set your own hourly range. It's shown clearly on your profile — no hidden surprises.

how.title: Live in three steps.

one.title: Fill in the application
one.description: Subject, city, hourly range, biography. Takes 5–8 minutes.

two.title: Our team reviews it
two.description: Identity and diploma verification happens in a separate step over email; we'll be in touch.

three.title: Profile live, matches start
three.description: Approved profiles appear in search and city × subject pages; matched lesson requests reach your phone.

how.verification_note: Document upload isn't enabled yet. Approval currently happens over email with our team.

form.title: Start your profile
form.subtitle: Fill the fields clearly — what you write here lands directly on your profile.
form.submit_footnote: Your application is sent to our team. The form is free, no app required.
form.error_generic: Couldn't submit your application. Please try again.

you.title: Who are you?
you.description: Name and contact. Your phone is shared only when you match a student.

teach.title: What do you teach?
teach.description: Pick subjects, set the price range, add your years of experience.

where.title: Where do you teach?
where.description: City and lesson modality. District is preferred.

about.title: Tell us about yourself
about.description: Short pitch and longer bio. Both appear on your profile as written.

consents.title: Consents
consents.description: Legal agreements. Both must be ticked to continue.

headline.label: Short pitch
headline.hint: Shows on your profile card. 10–120 chars.

bio.label: Biography
bio.placeholder: Your school, experience, teaching approach, achievements…
bio.hint: 60–1500 chars. Shown verbatim on your profile.

referral.label: How did you hear about us?

consents.kvkk: I have read the <privacy>KVKK & Privacy Policy</privacy> and consent to the processing of my personal data.
consents.teacher_terms: I have read and agree to the <terms>LessonRadar Tutor Agreement</terms>.

errors.headline_too_short: Short pitch must be at least 10 characters.
errors.bio_too_short: Biography must be at least 60 characters.
errors.phone_invalid: Enter a valid TR mobile number (5XX XXX XX XX).
errors.hourly_range_invalid: Max rate cannot be lower than min rate.
errors.disciplines_too_many: You can pick up to 8 subjects.
errors.modality_required: Pick at least one lesson type.
errors.kvkk_required: Tick the KVKK consent to continue.
errors.teacher_terms_required: Tick the Tutor Agreement to continue.

success.title: Your application is in.
success.subtitle: Our team will review it within a few business days. We'll reach out by email and may ask for additional documents.
success.what_next_step1: Our verification team reviews your application (1–3 business days).
success.what_next_step2: We share the outcome by email and may request documents (ID, diploma).
success.what_next_step3: Approved profiles appear in search results and city × subject pages.

onboarding.policy_notice: This form is not an offer of employment. Verification and listing depend on our team's review.

trust.subtitle: Every tutor on LessonRadar passes two checks.

reviews.verified_only: Only students who completed lessons can post reviews.

sidebar.request_pretext: Send a request to this tutor. Your phone is shared only after a match.

profile.policy_notice: Information shown here is supplied by the tutor; identity and diploma are verified by LessonRadar. Phone and email are only shared after a match.

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Enter your email and password to continue.

register.subtitle: Sign up in under a minute and match with verified tutors.

reset.resend_notice: New code sent. The previous one is no longer valid.
reset.success_subtitle: You can sign in with your new password.

metadata.description_fallback: LessonRadar legal document — transparent information about how we protect your data, the scope of the service, and your rights.

gizlilik.title: What does this page commit to?
bullets: We collect only the data needed to deliver the service (name, email, phone, lesson preference); we don't collect anything we don't need.
We follow the KVKK and GDPR principles: purpose-limited, time-bounded processing, transparency, and your right to access and erasure.
We share data with third parties only to the extent strictly required for service operation: Google sign-in, notification infrastructure, future payment intermediation.
We do not use your data for advertising and we do not sell it; we protect it with encryption and strict access controls.

kosullar.title: What does this page commit to?
bullets: LessonRadar is an intermediary platform; the lesson contract is formed only between the teacher and the student/guardian.
We expect you to share accurate information, communicate respectfully, and obey the law.
You can delete your account at any time; data is anonymised after a 30-day safe-hold period.
Disputes are governed by Turkish law and the courts of Gaziantep.

ogretmen-sozlesmesi.title: What does this page commit to?
bullets: LessonRadar is an intermediary platform; the teacher provides the lesson as an independent service provider.
Tax, social security, and other obligations arising from lesson income are the teacher's responsibility.
No commission is charged during beta; if a commission is later introduced it will be announced at least 30 days in advance.
Either party may terminate this agreement on 30 days' written notice.

draft_banner.title: This document is a draft.
draft_banner.body: The agreement below is a preliminary draft prepared in line with industry standards. It will be reviewed by counsel before publication, and the final version will replace this draft. For that reason this page is currently not indexed by search engines.
draft_banner.contact: For comments or questions about this draft, please write to <link>{email}</link>.
